sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 56:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 56:1
items.html: From the place of the new point of restriction in Bina of the ten Sefirot of NHY, which is the place of Tabur of Nekudim, down to the place of the point of the first restriction. This is the Malchut of the ten Sefirot of NHY of AK, the place of the separated BYA, since Bina is the place for the world of Beria, ZA is for the world of Yetzira, and Malchut is for the world of Assiya. (Inner Light, Item 7)
